Legal
All orders are processed within 2–5 business days. Shipping times vary by location. International orders may be subject to customs duties. We ship worldwide.
Items can be returned within 14 days of delivery in original, unworn condition with tags attached. Contact Misha.MP3@outlook.com with your order number to initiate a return. Sale items are final sale.
We collect only the information needed to process your order. Your data is never sold to third parties. All payment information is handled securely through Shopify. You can request deletion of your data at any time.
By purchasing from MP3 you agree to our terms of service. All products are sold as-is. MP3 reserves the right to cancel any order. Prices are subject to change without notice. All content on this site is the property of MP3.
